entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,246Chapters: 2/27Kudos: 6

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Risk
entry.summary:
Author: lushescape

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,119Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 11

Summary: Your father, New Jersey senator turned presidential candidate, has been threatened by an unknown source. And while you are still in the public eye, despite no longer living with your parents, your father insists on appointing you a bodyguard until the source of the threats is found.

entry.title: COLOR ME, YOU
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,477Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 44

Summary: "Can you cosplay as Red Hood for me, pretty please?"How does a minor crush on the hot guy at the library lead you to ask Jason Todd to be your muse. A story about how hope when given, returns to you when you least expect it. cross posted on tumblr @luviery

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,263Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 97

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.title: Standard Operating Procedure
entry.summary:
Author: Madieeee

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,580Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Tracking the same Black Mask shipment should have been straightforward. Instead, you end up compromised, bleeding, and forced to play the part of Jason Todd’s doting partner to escape a GCPD perimeter. Now, trapped in one of his dingy safehouses while the rain pours over Crime Alley, you have to survive the night with the most infuriating man in Gotham. The problem with playing a part is that eventually, the lines start to blur

entry.title: Hangman's Trick // J. Todd
entry.summary:
Author: themoonunderstandsmyneeds

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,071Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 57

Summary: They were the best of friends, the girl and the boy from the slums. Hunched over books together in the library, vicious games of uno, movies and popcorn on the couch, tending to each other's scrapes and cuts, sleepovers, nights on the rooftops of Gotham, two children playing at being heroes. They never knew what awaited them, the horrors and traumas that were just a breath away. They haven't seen each other in over seven years, he's supposed to be dead, she's supposed to have moved on. But, nothing is the way it's supposed to be.   ( A/N: not the best summary but you get the point lol. don't expect this to be a comic accurate story. i will do my best to keep characters how they are represented in their media but i'm not holding myself to any particular story line. consider this an AU if you will. please check TW's. i will put chapter specific ones in the notes at the start of every chapter but for the first chapter i will try and cover all the potential triggers this story will cover. anyways, essentially this is a story where you are jason's childhood best friend, who isn't aware that he is alive. don't expect everything to make perfect sense, we will gain more backstory as we progress. enjoy xx.)

entry.title: Underground
entry.summary:
Author: lulustars28

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,492Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 7

Summary: There is one name in Gotham's underground fighting circuit that strikes fear in all fighters: "Red Hood".Jason Todd is Roman Sionis golden fighter, who has made him millions. To Roman, Jason is nothing more than property and profit. The only reason Jason is Roman's lapdog is to win money to put food on the table for him and his younger brother, Tim. The money is never enough, but it keeps them alive. Walking away has never been an option. Because years ago, Jason made a promise to someone who never came back. A girl he met in stolen moments between worlds—someone who made him believe, briefly, that Gotham didn’t have to be loneliness and survival. Someone who promised she wouldn’t disappear like everyone else. Then she did. No goodbye. No explanation. No way to find her again. Jason buried the memory the only way he knew how: by assuming she had chosen to forget him. Now she’s back. After six years abroad, Roman Sionis’s daughter has finally returned to Gotham. Jason sees her as a traitor due to her broken promises. She sees him as another one of her father's thugs. But how long can their past stay buried under contempt, and how long can it be before old feelings begin to rise to the surface?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,430Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 31

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.summary:
Author: locallilkiddo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,170Chapters: 8/8Kudos: 294

Summary: The five times a vigilante saved you, and the one time he didn’t. You work at the local diner in Park Row where anyone of any walks of life are allowed in, including the titular Red Hood. entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: LicoricexWitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,710Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 234

Summary: You've always been obsessed with superheroes, ever since you were a little kid. You moved to Gotham all alone with stars in your eyes for undergrad before the cold reality of city-living set in. The streets were mean and people weren't as kind as they were back home. It was hard to make friends and you preferred to stay inside, making you even lonelier. You were a regular fish out of water, not a lot of close friends or family, living all alone--the perfect target for someone with not-so-nice intentions. They always said not to meet your heroes because they could never live up to your expectations. Or sometimes, they weren't a hero at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
